rationale: Educ. Code §39.007 governs judicial appeals of commissioner decisions under §39.006 regarding school district accountability. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 39.007. JUDICIAL APPEAL. (a) Notwithstanding Chapter 2001, Government Code, a school district may only appeal a decision made by the commissioner under Section 39.006 in accordance with this section.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns school district judicial appeal procedures; the proposed change concerns homestead exemption amounts. No overlap in subject matter.
